title: Sony will stop producing PlayStation discs and envisions a fully digital future by 2028
summary: The company confirms the cessation of physical game production from 2028, sparking intense debate in the industry about the abandonment of the physical format.

title: Subnautica 2 litigation ends: Krafton pays million-dollar bonuses and CEO resigns
summary: After a long legal dispute, Unknown Worlds developers will receive the promised bonuses and the executive who led the legal battle leaves the company.

title: Microsoft cuts Xbox investment with layoffs at Arkane and IO Interactive
summary: The company's internal restructuring affects major studios and projects, although Hideo Kojima's horror game for Xbox is not in danger.

title: Mario Kart World receives its first major update with new tracks and photo mode
summary: Patch 1.7.0 breaks a long content drought by adding two new tracks for Knockout Tour mode and a revamped photo function.

title: PlayStation Plus announces its free games for July 2026, including Modern Warfare 3
summary: Sony's monthly subscription reveals its lineup of titles for the next month.

title: PlayStation will close PS3 and PS Vita digital stores in 2027
summary: Sony confirms the definitive closure of online stores for its past generation consoles.

title: Xbox tests a system to convert physical games to digital for Project Helix
summary: The company seeks to eliminate dependence on discs in the next generation through a digital redemption system.

title: Rockstar employees report mandatory crunch and gender pay gap in GTA 6 development
summary: Rockstar North workers request union recognition in the face of harsh working conditions imposed during video game production.

title: Metroid Ravenous, the possible Dread sequel for Switch 2, leaked through an age rating
summary: The registration in Brazil of the mysterious title suggests that Nintendo is working on a new game in the saga for its next console.

title: Rhythm Heaven Groove arrives on Switch with positive reviews and an innovative RPG mode
summary: The new installment of Nintendo's classic music game is acclaimed by critics as a perfect cycle closer for the first generation of Switch.

title: ESA sparks controversy by calling Minecraft and Call of Duty private servers 'illegal'
summary: The video game association's statements trigger a wave of criticism, forcing the organization to clarify its controversial claims.

title: The Steam Machine concept is reborn: Dbrand shell canceled and new competitor in France
summary: Interest in Steam Machine-style consoles returns to the spotlight with new accessories and unofficial commercial proposals.

title: EA reverses Battlefield 6 experience boosters twice in a month causing confusion
summary: The company introduces changes to the game's bonuses and then reverts them, admitting that the implemented improvements were mistakes.

title: Love and Deepspace cancels its new love date Valko after fan protest
summary: The developer of the popular mobile dating game withdraws the character in the face of massive negative reaction from the community.

title: Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition will have a physical edition on Switch 2 from Limited Run Games
summary: Lara Croft's classic adventure will receive a physical release for Nintendo's new console.

title: Cinder City sparks controversy by requiring 32 GB of RAM as minimum requirement
summary: The promising post-apocalyptic open-world shooter triggers debate with exorbitant PC technical requirements.

title: The creators of Against the Storm announce a survival game in the same universe
summary: Eremite Games confirms that its next project will be set in the infested world of its acclaimed city builder.

title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 director assures that its open world fulfills the promise of the genre
summary: Sandfall Interactive defends the vision of its anticipated RPG and praises the legacy of titles like Kingdom Hearts II in its design.

title: Netflix develops a Persona live-action series with Star Trek: Picard writers
summary: The popular Japanese RPG franchise will make the leap to live-action in a new adaptation for the streaming platform.

title: Dragon Age universe creator calls generative AI a plague in video games
summary: David Gaider rails against the industry's directive, considering generative AI a dangerous distraction created by executives.
